title: 200 Disposable Nitrile Gloves Small Blue – Medical Examination Powder-Free Latex-Free Strong Durable Tear-Resistant for Healthcare, Dental, Food, Cleaning, Automotive & Industrial Use (Small)
features: 🧤 Size Small, 200 blue nitrile gloves gloves, crafted from high-quality nitrile for superior strength, puncture resistance and dependable protection during medical exams, food handling, mechanical and industrial tasks.

🧤 Examination and Food Grade, comfortable, stretchy and strong – safe for users with latex allergies; powder-free design prevents contamination, ideal for healthcare, food prep, mechanical, beauty and clean-handling environments.
🧤 Engineered to handle tough jobs – maintains excellent flexibility and tactile sensitivity while providing strong barrier protection.
🧤 Perfect for medical and care professionals, mechanics, food service workers, cleaners, tattoo artists, hair stylists, kitchens, DIY, painting and anyone needing reliable disposable gloves.
🧤 Touch-screen compatible and ambidextrous; designed for a snug, comfortable feel with easy on/off wear – textured fingertips enhance grip, even when wet or oily.
